title: Generation/download completion notification silent when window focused
description:
BUG (regression, introduced 1.2.0): no completion feedback when the app window is focused. notificationService.js listens for generation:complete / download:complete and only ever forwarded an OS notification, which main.js suppresses via mainWindow.isFocused() (main.js:713). A code comment promised an in-app toast for the focused case, but that toast was never wired — so focused = silent for both generations and downloads.

ROOT CAUSE: the OS-notification refactor dropped the focused-toast path; the notificationPrefs checkbox was also being treated as a master mute rather than an OS-notification-only toggle.

FIX (js/shell/notificationService.js): split completion feedback on document.hasFocus(). The pref toggles OS notifications ONLY, never mutes feedback. Truth table: pref ON + unfocused -> OS notification; pref ON + focused -> in-app StatusBar toast; pref OFF (any focus) -> in-app toast, never OS. init no longer early-returns when ipcRenderer is absent, so browser mode gets the toast too. UW-install skip and per-kind prefs preserved.

No version bump (internal fix). No changelog entry (bug introduced this version, never shipped). USER-VERIFIED.
